_notes.note_main_file: id=52 Improved Renew (spec_tree=-1) is a Holy-tree talent — not duplicated here.
_notes.note_bit_sharing: mask2 bit10 (0x400=1024) is a shared Priest family marker. ALWAYS exclude from specific-spell masks. All flags below use unique bits only.
_notes.todo_divine_providence: Circle of Healing (34861), Holy Nova (15237), Lightwell (724) flags not yet verified — run .spellinfo all on each to complete id=166.

talent_affixes._todo: Healing Focus (2r, tier 1) — Reduces chance of losing cast when struck by 35%/70%. Pushback resistance mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Renew
talent_affixes.notes: Renew healing +5% per rank — flags confirmed: 0x40=64 (mask0 bit6). Exclude mask2=1024 (shared Priest marker).

talent_affixes.name: Holy Specialization
talent_affixes.notes: Holy spell crit +1%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 100=1%). All-ones matches every Priest spell.

talent_affixes._todo: Spell Warding (5r, tier 2) — Reduces all spell damage taken by 2%/rank. School-based damage reduction, not a SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Divine Fury
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1314944,0,0]=0x141080: Smite(585) bit7(128) | Greater Heal(2060) bit12(4096) | Heal(2050) bit18(262144) | Holy Fire(14914) bit20(1048576, mask2=1024 excluded). Cast time -100ms/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Desperate Prayer (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Blessed Recovery (3r, tier 4) — Proc-based: after being struck critically, heals over 6s for 2/4/6% of damage taken. Requires hit-taken trigger, not SpellMod.
Inspiration (3r, tier 4) — Proc-based: after a critical heal, reduces physical damage taken by target by 10/15/25%. Requires crit trigger, not SpellMod.
Holy Nova (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Lightwell (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Healing
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[268288,4,0]: Heal(2050) bit18(262144) | Greater Heal(2060) bit12(4096) | Flash Heal(2061) bit11(2048) → mask0=268288; Binding Heal(32546) mask1 bit2(4). Mana cost -5%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Healing Prayers
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[512,32,0]: Prayer of Healing(596) mask0 bit9(0x200=512); Prayer of Mending(33076) mask1 bit5(0x20=32, mask2=1024 excluded). Mana cost -10%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Spirit of Redemption (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Spiritual Guidance (5r, tier 6) — Converts Spirit to bonus spell power. Passive stat conversion, not SpellMod.
Surge of Light (2r, tier 6) — Proc-based: Smite/Holy Fire crit makes next Flash Heal free and instant. Requires crit trigger, not SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Spiritual Healing
talent_affixes.notes: All healing done +2%/rank. All-ones matches every Priest spell.

talent_affixes._todo: Holy Concentration (3r, tier 7) — Proc-based: after a Renew/Heal/Flash Heal/Binding Heal/Greater Heal critical, gain increased mana regen. Complex mana proc, not SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Empowered Healing
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[6144,4,0]: Flash Heal(2061) bit11(2048) | Greater Heal(2060) bit12(4096) → mask0=6144; Binding Heal(32546) mask1 bit2(4). Healing bonus +4%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Serendipity (3r, tier 8) — Proc-based: Flash Heal/Binding Heal crit reduces next Greater Heal/Prayer of Healing cast time. Requires proc trigger, not SpellMod.
Empowered Renew (3r, tier 9) — Renew instantly heals for 15/30/45% of total periodic effect on application. Requires an instant heal proc on cast, not a simple SpellMod.
Circle of Healing (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Test of Faith (3r, tier 9) — Conditional bonus when target is below 50% HP. Requires HP-threshold check, not SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Divine Providence
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1346372096,36,0]=0x50400200: Prayer of Healing(596) bit9(512) | Circle of Healing(34861) bit28(0x10000000=268435456) | Holy Nova(15237) bit22(0x400000=4194304) | Lightwell(724) bit30(0x40000000=1073741824) → mask0=1346372096; Prayer of Mending(33076) mask1 bit5(32); Binding Heal(32546) mask1 bit2(4) → mask1=36. Multi-target heal effectiveness +2%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Guardian Spirit (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
